pr_text:
## Title: Fix RLC AM protocol timer compliance and poll retransmit logic

### Summary
This change corrects two 3GPP TS 36.322 specification violations in the RLC AM entity. First, the `t-Reordering` timer decoding table contained an incorrect maximum value of 1600ms (entry 31) instead of the required 2000ms, causing non-compliant timer behavior when the highest encoded value is configured. Second, the logic for stopping `t-PollRetransmit` incorrectly used sequence number comparisons rather than
